concerns.text: FR-008 (Sensitivity Analysis on sparsity patterns) has no corresponding plan element. The plan.md mentions 'Three Policies' and 'Statistical Replications' but lacks any phase, task, or data-model entity dedicated to varying sparsity levels or running the sensitivity analysis required by FR-008.

FR-009 (Calibrate cost model parameters) is mentioned in the plan's 'Technical Context' as a constraint but lacks a specific implementation task or phase in the plan.md to perform the calibration against published benchmarks (NVMe/DDR4) before simulation runs.

FR-010 (Warm-up verification on a subset) is referenced in the plan's 'Complexity Tracking' as a mitigation, but the plan lacks a dedicated 'Warm-up' phase or explicit task to execute the subset verification before the full 10-replication run.

SC-008 (Report graph density and overlap distribution) is not explicitly covered by a plan element. While 'Topology Graph' is a data entity, the plan does not specify a reporting step or metric aggregation task to output these specific graph statistics.
